events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 63
events.blurb: Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 63rd birthday today, the iconic singer behind hits like Girls Just Want to Have Fun and Time After Time.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: The unmistakable voice of Cyndi Lauper is still going strong as she turns 63 today, we're celebrating with her biggest hits on Nation 80s

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Today would have been George Michael's 63rd birthday, the legendary singer and songwriter behind Wham! and a successful solo career.

angles.name: Remembering George Michael
angles.copy: We're remembering the incredible talent of George Michael on what would have been his 63rd birthday, with his greatest hits on Nation 80s and Nation 90s

events.title: Michael Jackson's Death Anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Pop, Michael Jackson.

angles.name: The King of Pop
angles.copy: We're paying tribute to the one and only Michael Jackson on the anniversary of his passing, with his iconic music on Nation 80s and Nation 90s

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today, the legendary drummer for The Beatles.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: We're celebrating the 86th birthday of Ringo Starr, the iconic drummer of The Beatles, with their biggest hits on Nation 60s

events.title: Brian May turns 74
events.blurb: Brian May, the legendary guitarist of Queen, celebrates his 74th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: The iconic Brian May turns 74 today, we're rocking out to Queen's biggest hits on Nation Rocks

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Mick Jagger, the legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Rolling Stones Icon
angles.copy: The one and only Mick Jagger turns 83 today, we're celebrating with The Rolling Stones' greatest hits on Nation 60s and Nation Rocks

events.title: MTV Launch Anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the launch of MTV, the first music television channel.

angles.name: Music TV Revolution
angles.copy: We're looking back at the launch of MTV, the channel that changed music television forever, with the first video ever played, Video Killed The Radio Star by The Buggles on Nation 80s

events.title: Oasis Release Definitely Maybe Anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the release of Oasis' debut album Definitely Maybe.

angles.name: Britpop Classics
angles.copy: We're celebrating the anniversary of Oasis' debut album Definitely Maybe, a classic of the Britpop era, on Nation 90s

events.title: Woodstock Festival Anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the iconic Woodstock Festival.

angles.name: Peace and Music
angles.copy: We're looking back at the iconic Woodstock Festival, a pivotal moment in music history, with the sounds of the 60s on Nation 60s

events.title: Elvis' Death Anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: The King of Rock and Roll
angles.copy: We're paying tribute to the one and only Elvis Presley on the anniversary of his passing, with his iconic music on Nation 60s and Nation Easy

events.title: Tupac Shakur Shot Anniversary

angles.name: Hip Hop Legend

events.title: Jimi Hendrix' Death Anniversary

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: We're paying tribute to the one and only Jimi Hendrix on the anniversary of his passing, with his iconic music on Nation 60s and Nation Rocks

events.title: The Beatles Release Abbey Road Anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the release of The Beatles' iconic album Abbey Road.

angles.name: Beatles Classic
angles.copy: We're celebrating the anniversary of The Beatles' iconic album Abbey Road, a classic of the 60s, on Nation 60s

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: The unmistakable voice of Chrissie Hynde turns 75 today, we're celebrating with The Pretenders' biggest hits on Nation 80s

angles.name: Music Technology
angles.copy: We're looking back at the release of the first Apple iPod, a game-changer in music technology, and how it changed the way we listen to music

events.title: James Bond Day
